title: Round Damask Tablecloth - Alterio
features: All South Street Tablecloths products are made to order and nonrefundable.
Damask tablecloths are a mark of luxury and add a certain level of grace and majesty to your event venue.
Damask has all the feel and performance of polyester combined with the unique floral designs that resembles a product of the old world and will be a fabric you depend on for years to come.
